vehicle.model_designation_position: lower left (from viewer perspective), below grille, above bumper

composition.truck_orientation: tractor at front left, trailer extending rear right
composition.important_crop_information: left edge of cab cropped slightly, right side and roof are fully visible

company_identity.appearance: large white letters on dark background

company_identity.position: above right headlight and on upper trailer side, horizontal
cab side under window, horizontal, right side

owner_signatures.position: center of windshield, inside glass, horizontal script style
front grille, vertical badge on right side (from viewer perspective)

grille_lights.position: integrated within three central grille bars, left to right; two per row (middle three bars)

bumper_lights.position: outer corners of bumper, left and right

main_headlights.position: lower corners of cab front, integrated into bumper area, left and right

windshield_contents: Possible stickers, passenger side lower corner

front_geometry.grille_description: Five horizontal black mesh bars, three with paired orange lamps, chrome accents above and below each bar, SCANIA badge above grille.
front_geometry.headlight_description: Rectangular lamps, horizontal orientation, integrated into bumper corners with LED strip/indicator beneath.
front_geometry.bumper_description: Dark bumper with silver/grey trim, fog/auxiliary lights on each side, yellow license plate mounted centrally.
